topics.topic: Computer security service in Stockholm, Sweden
topics.briefDescription: Detectify AB is a computer security service based in Stockholm, Sweden, specializing in External Attack Surface Management (EASM). The company provides highly accurate vulnerability assessments by automating continuous real-world, payload-based attacks, crowdsourced through a global community of elite ethical hackers, which helps ProdSec and AppSec teams identify and address critical weaknesses in their Internet-facing applications. Detectify AB primarily serves cybersecurity professionals and organizations looking to enhance their security posture against external threats.

SaaS platform that analyzes log, metric, and security data in real-time using machine learning to streamline delivery and maintenance processes for software providers. The company offers a unique data streaming pipeline that analyzes operational and security events in real-time, providing long-term trend analysis and insights. Coralogix Ltd. primarily serves software providers and IT teams looking to enhance their operational efficiency and security monitoring capabilities.

PlacePay is a payment platform designed to streamline rent and housing-related transactions for landlords, property managers, and tenants. It offers features such as automated rent collection, secure payments, and a tenant portal, setting itself apart by enabling flexible payment plans and co-resident payment splitting. PlacePay is aimed at property managers, landlords, and tenants seeking a modern, efficient solution for housing-related financial transactions.

End-to-end AI SaaS platform designed to solve real-world AI use cases by leveraging machine learning to analyze historical patterns and provide predictive analytics. The platform offers services such as business integration of large language models (LLMs) and generative AI, development of specialized services in generative AI, and data science solutions, differentiating itself by enabling businesses to outsource their IT projects. Smartpredict primarily targets businesses looking to enhance their operations through advanced AI and data science solutions, allowing them to focus on core activities and stimulate growth.

Term Frequency–Inverse Document Frequency (TF-IDF) is a numerical statistic used to reflect the importance of a word in a document relative to a collection of documents. It combines two metrics: Term Frequency (TF), which measures how frequently a term appears in a document, and Inverse Document Frequency (IDF), which assesses the importance of the term by considering how common or rare it is across all documents. TF-IDF is commonly used in information retrieval and text mining to identify and rank the relevance of terms within a document corpus.

Cloud-based case management software tailored for the legal industry, offering features such as timekeeping, billing, payments, legal drafting, and calendaring. Filevine differentiates itself by providing a comprehensive suite of tools designed to enhance law firm efficiency and streamline legal workflows. The software is primarily targeted at law firms and legal professionals seeking to improve their operational efficiency and case management processes.

Platform offering real-time AI-powered chat, photos, and videos aimed at fostering an engaging, sex-positive environment for self-expression and intimacy. It differentiates itself by providing a judgment-free space that encourages open communication and personal exploration. The platform primarily targets individuals seeking a safe and supportive environment for intimate interactions and self-expression.

A comprehensive tool in the field of digital marketing and SEO, offering a suite of features to analyze website performance, track backlinks, research keywords, and monitor competitors. It stands out for its extensive database and accurate data, providing valuable insights to improve search engine rankings and drive organic traffic. Ahrefs is widely used by SEO professionals, marketers, and website owners aiming to enhance their online presence.

KOReader is an open-source document viewer designed primarily for e-ink devices. It supports a wide range of file formats, including EPUB, PDF, and DJVU, providing a customizable and feature-rich reading experience. KOReader is mainly targeted at e-reader users who seek an alternative to default reading apps, offering enhanced functionality and greater control over their reading environment.

Technology company specializing in content creation and influencer marketing. The platform connects brands with content creators, including photographers, videographers, and social media influencers, to generate high-quality, authentic content for marketing campaigns. Primarily targets brands and businesses looking to enhance their marketing strategies through professional and user-generated content.

A version control strategy where multiple projects are stored in a single repository. This approach simplifies dependency management, code sharing, and refactoring across projects, but can introduce challenges related to scalability, build times, and repository size. Monorepos are particularly beneficial for large organizations and development teams that need to manage interdependent projects efficiently.

Programming language that compiles to efficient and human-readable JavaScript. ReScript is known for its robust type system, simplicity, speed, and excellent developer experience, offering strong type safety, seamless JavaScript interoperability, and optimized performance while supporting functional programming paradigms. It is particularly beneficial for developers seeking a reliable and efficient language for building web applications with strong type safety and performance optimization.

Global technology firm offering a SaaS-based Delivery Automation Platform. The software aids brands in sectors like Food & Beverage, Courier, Express and Parcel, eCommerce & Retail, and Transportation (3PLs, 4PLs) to digitize, optimize, and automate deliveries across the supply chain, enhancing efficiency and reducing operational costs. The platform is primarily targeted at businesses looking to streamline their delivery processes and improve supply chain management.

Free and open-source application that allows users to control and display Android devices from a computer. It offers high performance, low latency, and high resolution, supporting various operating systems including Windows, macOS, and Linux, and features such as audio forwarding, file transfer, and screen recording. Scrcpy is primarily used by developers for debugging, users for presentations, and individuals who need to control their Android devices from their computers.

Data analysis platform specialized in TikTok ecommerce, designed to help users find creators and products that can assist in growing their business. Kalodata differentiates itself by providing targeted insights and analytics specifically for the TikTok platform, enabling users to optimize their marketing strategies and identify high-potential opportunities. The platform is primarily aimed at businesses and marketers looking to leverage TikTok for ecommerce growth and influencer partnerships.

User interface developed by Samsung Electronics for its Android devices, starting from Android 9 'Pie' and later versions. One UI aims to enhance usability on larger smartphones by offering a more visually appealing and user-friendly experience, distinguishing itself from its predecessors, Samsung Experience and TouchWiz. It is primarily targeted at users of Samsung's phones, tablets, watches, and Windows laptops, available in over 100 languages.

topics.topic: Software company in Johannesburg, South Africa
topics.briefDescription: Appointment scheduling software designed to streamline the process of booking appointments, managing clients, and enhancing the overall customer experience. It typically offers features such as simplified appointment booking, client management, and automated reminders to improve efficiency and reduce no-shows. This software is particularly beneficial for businesses and professionals who rely on scheduled appointments, such as healthcare providers, salons, and service-based industries.

A software company based in San Jose, California, specializing in cloud networking solutions. The company provides integrated network and security services, end-to-end operational visibility, advanced controls, and governance, all delivered as-a-service, allowing users to design, provision, and manage networks across various cloud environments without hardware or software installations. Their solutions are primarily targeted at global Fortune-100 enterprises, leading integrators, and managed service providers.

Adventure platform that transforms cities into personal playgrounds, offering a variety of fun and engaging activities. Questo differentiates itself by providing interactive, self-guided tours and quests that combine elements of exploration, learning, and entertainment, enhancing the travel experience. It is designed for solo travelers, couples, families, and friends seeking unique and memorable adventures in urban environments.

Platform for B2B sales and marketing professionals to find accurate contact and company information. It offers tools for lead generation, data enrichment, and sales prospecting, with a database that includes millions of business profiles and contact details, enhancing sales and marketing efforts. The platform is known for its user-friendly interface and integration capabilities with various CRM systems, targeting sales and marketing professionals seeking to improve their outreach and data accuracy.

Technology that uses software robots to automate repetitive, rule-based tasks typically performed by humans. RPA provides value by increasing efficiency, reducing errors, and freeing up human workers for more complex tasks, with large vendors entering the market and offerings evolving. It is particularly beneficial for businesses looking to streamline operations and improve productivity in areas such as data entry, customer service, and financial transactions.

Free, online, and open-source tool designed for creating user flow prototypes. It enables users to create visually appealing prototypes without requiring Photoshop skills, making it accessible for those with limited design experience. Wireflow is particularly useful for UX/UI designers and developers who need to quickly visualize and communicate user flows in their projects.

A software company based in Brooklyn, New York, that modernizes the product sourcing and specification process for design professionals through an intuitive, data-driven platform. The platform allows users to compare, specify, and learn about thousands of products efficiently, aiming to reduce the time spent on manual documentation, and is trusted by over 12,000 firms. Acelab primarily targets design professionals seeking to streamline their workflow and focus more on their core creative activities.

A 3D modeling program designed for creating and editing low-poly models, particularly for use in Minecraft. It is widely used by Minecraft modders and resource pack creators to design custom models and animations, supporting various formats and offering features like texture painting, animation, and model exporting. Blockbench primarily benefits game developers, modders, and digital artists who focus on Minecraft content creation.

Educational platform designed to support various learning environments, including online, hybrid, and in-person settings. ClassIn offers features such as interactive classrooms, an in-school social app, lesson scheduling, homework management, and a school management dashboard, differentiating itself by providing comprehensive tools for both educators and students. The platform primarily benefits K-12 schools and educators seeking to manage and enhance the learning experience for their students.

Free and open-source application firewall designed to help users restore privacy and take back control over their network traffic. It provides tools to monitor and manage network connections, enhancing security and privacy for the user. Portmaster is particularly beneficial for individuals and organizations concerned with network security and privacy management.

Marketing automation platform designed to assist businesses with eCommerce SMS and email marketing. It enables businesses to acquire, retain, and grow their customer base by automating the process of sending marketing emails and SMS messages, offering tools and playbooks for enhanced control and ownership over marketing efforts. Klaviyo primarily targets eCommerce businesses and creators looking to optimize their marketing strategies and improve customer engagement.

Leading provider of a GenAI-powered learning and skilling suite, which includes Learning Management System (LMS), Learning Experience Platform (LXP), and Frontline Enablement (FLE). The company differentiates itself by offering personalized learning solutions that cater to both knowledge and frontline workers, aiming to unlock business potential through tailored educational experiences. Disprz primarily targets organizations looking to enhance their workforce's skills and capabilities through advanced, AI-driven learning technologies.

Web hosting service that offers free hosting solutions with support for PHP and MySQL, suitable for hosting WordPress sites. It provides users with a free subdomain or the option to bring their own domain, featuring large storage and bandwidth but limited CPU resources. InfinityFree primarily targets individuals and small businesses looking for an affordable web hosting solution.

A visual guide that represents the skeletal framework of a website, used in web design. Wireframes map out the main features and navigation of a new website design, providing an idea of the site's functionality before considering visual design elements like content and color schemes. They are primarily used by web designers and developers to plan the structure and user experience of a website.

No-code conversational commerce platform designed to help small and medium-sized companies modernize and automate their customer conversations on WhatsApp. Gallabox allows businesses to deploy ready-to-use workflows to turn leads into deals and conversations into commerce, featuring a Broadcast Dashboard for organizing, crafting, and monitoring the performance of broadcast messages. The platform is primarily targeted at small and medium-sized enterprises looking to enhance their customer engagement and streamline their sales processes through WhatsApp.

Software company based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, founded in 2013 by Ahmad Alzaini and Mosab Al Othmani. It provides an all-in-one, cloud-based point-of-sale (POS) and restaurant management solution, offering features such as customer relationship management, payment acceptance, sales and inventory tracking, and integration with third-party apps. Foodics primarily targets restaurant owners and operators seeking comprehensive management tools to streamline their operations and enhance efficiency.

topics.topic: Software company in Fort Collins, Colorado
topics.briefDescription: Property management platform designed to streamline the rental process for landlords. It offers features such as rental marketing, online rental applications, tenant screening, renters insurance, tenant management and communication, and landlord forms and education, differentiating itself by providing a comprehensive, free-to-use solution. TurboTenant primarily targets landlords and property managers seeking to simplify and enhance their rental management operations.

Kevel offers infrastructure APIs that allow companies to create custom ad platforms for various types of advertisements, including sponsored listings and native ads. This service helps publishers generate additional revenue streams and lessen their reliance on major ad tech companies such as Google, Amazon, and Facebook. Kevel primarily targets publishers and businesses looking to build and manage their own advertising solutions.

Innovative and easy-to-use shipping solution designed for eCommerce professionals. It helps manage the shipping and fulfillment process for eCommerce stores and offers exclusive discounted carrier rates, allowing users to import orders from any platform using a CSV file, thereby streamlining the shipping process and potentially saving on shipping costs. Clickship is primarily targeted at eCommerce businesses looking to optimize their shipping operations and reduce costs.

A district in Chiyoda, Tokyo, known for its historical significance and cultural landmarks. Kanda is home to numerous shrines, temples, and traditional shops, making it a popular destination for both tourists and locals interested in Japanese culture and history. The area attracts history enthusiasts, cultural tourists, and residents seeking a blend of modern and traditional Japanese experiences.

Software solution designed to manage and automate various human resource functions. It provides value by streamlining processes such as employee information management, payroll, recruitment, benefits administration, time and attendance, performance management, compliance, and reporting, thereby increasing efficiency and accuracy in HR operations. HRIS is primarily targeted at HR professionals and organizations seeking to optimize their human resource management and administrative tasks.

Company that provides tools and services designed to help companies create interactive content easily and efficiently. Ceros differentiates itself by offering a no-code platform that allows users to design and publish interactive digital experiences without the need for traditional development resources, thereby enhancing customer engagement and marketing effectiveness. The primary target demographic for Ceros includes marketers, designers, and content creators looking to produce engaging, interactive content to boost audience interaction and brand visibility.

Referring to the ESUP intervention model, it is a system specifically designed to offer immediate aid to individuals in mental distress or crisis situations. The model's unique approach involves reaching these individuals directly at the incident location, thus providing timely help. It further facilitates access to a variety of tailored services, including legal aid, healthcare, social services, and community support.

SaaS platform that enables users to integrate their applications with over 250 other apps. It provides tools for authentication, data reading, writing, and synchronization, along with a marketplace UI and backend to facilitate these integrations, making it easier for users to add integrations directly within their products. Integry is primarily targeted at businesses and developers looking to streamline and enhance their app integration capabilities.

ZeroTier is a smart programmable Ethernet switch that enables all networked devices, virtual machines (VMs), containers, and applications to communicate as if they are all located in the same physical data center or cloud region. It creates a virtual network that spans across different physical locations, simplifying the management and security of network communications. ZeroTier is particularly beneficial for IT professionals and organizations looking to streamline their network infrastructure and enhance connectivity across distributed environments.

Petpooja is a company that offers Point of Sale (POS) solutions specifically designed for the restaurant industry. Their platform provides a range of services including menu management, order management, online payment processing, table management, kitchen staff management, and customer relationship management (CRM) solutions, helping restaurants manage reports and analytics related to daily and monthly sales, profits, taxes, and online orders, including GST compliance. Petpooja primarily targets restaurant owners and managers seeking comprehensive and efficient POS systems to streamline their operations and enhance customer service.

Content collaboration platform designed to streamline marketing teamwork. It allows users to create, plan, review, and approve various types of marketing content, including social media posts, blogs, newsletters, and press releases, making the process more efficient and organized. Planable is primarily targeted at marketing teams and agencies seeking to enhance their content management and collaboration workflows.

Employee monitoring software designed to help employers track their employees' computer activity and productivity. Monitask offers HR and time tracking solutions for SMBs and enterprises, featuring easy setup, detailed reporting, and responsive customer service, which differentiates it from competitors. The software is primarily targeted at businesses seeking to enhance employee productivity and streamline HR processes.

Learning platform designed to make skilling personalized and accessible. It offers a blend of self-paced online courses, hands-on practice, virtual live online classes, compliance courses, and coaching, differentiating itself by providing a variety of learning methods to suit different needs and preferences. The platform primarily targets individuals and organizations looking to close skill gaps and mitigate risk through diverse learning opportunities.

Workplace learning software company based in Austin, Texas, offering an end-to-end learning management system. The platform focuses on making learning easy, accessible, rewarding, and fun, supporting various types of content delivery to keep learners curious and engaged. It caters to both frontline employees and corporate office staff, emphasizing career development and skill enhancement.

Naboo is a platform that streamlines the booking of corporate seminars, offering services such as venue selection, catering, activities, and transportation. By providing an all-in-one solution, it simplifies the planning process for company retreats, away days, team-building events, and corporate parties. Naboo primarily targets businesses seeking efficient and comprehensive arrangements for their corporate events.

API that allows developers to embed virtual computers into their web applications, enabling users to interact with third-party websites or applications directly within the web app. Hyperbeam differentiates itself by providing seamless integration and interactive capabilities, enhancing user experience and engagement within web applications. This API is particularly beneficial for developers and businesses looking to offer more interactive and integrated web experiences to their users.

Innovative online platform that connects medical organizations with individuals interested in participating in research studies. It aims to facilitate the process of finding and enrolling in studies, thereby contributing to scientific research and advancing healthcare. Probando primarily targets medical researchers and individuals seeking to participate in clinical trials and research studies.

Platform that empowers experts by providing tools for personalized and meaningful 1:1 interactions. It allows experts to monetize their knowledge and time investment by offering guidance and wisdom to others, combining functionalities such as scheduling, landing pages, and payment collection. Topmate is primarily targeted at solopreneurs and professionals seeking to offer their expertise in a structured and profitable manner.

RYSE Supplements is a company that produces and sells nutritional supplements, focusing on enhancing physical performance and overall health. Their product line includes pre-workouts, protein powders, creatine, and hydration aids, emphasizing premium quality ingredients, transparent labeling, and unique flavors developed in collaboration with popular brands. RYSE targets fitness enthusiasts, athletes, and individuals seeking to improve their health and workout performance with high-quality, effective supplements.

Open-source build and test tool developed by Google, designed to handle large codebases and support multiple programming languages. Bazel is known for its high performance, scalability, and ability to build and test code across different platforms, utilizing a build language called Starlark. It is particularly beneficial for developers and organizations managing extensive and complex software projects.

Vacation rental management software that provides a comprehensive suite of tools for property owners and managers. Smoobu offers features such as a Channel Manager, Property Management System (PMS), Booking Engine, Website creation, Communications tools, Online Check-in, and a Guest Guide, making it easy to synchronize room rates and manage reservations efficiently. The software is particularly beneficial for vacation rental owners and managers seeking a user-friendly and efficient solution to streamline their operations.

Mobile point-of-sale (POS) system designed to streamline sales, inventory, and employee management for small businesses. It offers features such as point of sale, inventory management, employee management, sales analytics, customer relationship management (CRM), and loyalty programs, differentiating itself by providing a comprehensive suite of tools in a single platform. Loyverse is particularly useful for retail and restaurant businesses aiming to enhance their operational efficiency and customer service.

Enterprise-ready EHS (Environmental, Health, and Safety) management software platform based in Sydney, Australia. It centralizes compliance and reporting intelligently, offering over 50 modules to create a complete, fit-for-purpose solution for various organizational needs, enhancing EHSQ (Environmental, Health, Safety, and Quality) and ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) management. The platform is targeted at organizations looking to improve workplace safety, compliance, and overall operational efficiency.

Property management software designed to assist small to mid-sized landlords in managing their rental properties efficiently. The software offers features such as tenant screening, lease signing, rent collection, work order management, financial organization, and tenant communication, distinguishing itself by providing a streamlined and user-friendly interface without unnecessary complexities. Innago primarily targets small to mid-sized landlords seeking an effective and straightforward property management solution.

topics.topic: Information services in Surry Hills, Australia
topics.briefDescription: Company providing AR-powered remote video support and communication platforms with AI data capture. Streem enhances customer interactions by reducing waste and inefficiencies, making knowledge and information more accessible through advanced technologies. Its services are particularly beneficial for businesses requiring remote support and communication solutions.

Security-focused operating system based on Debian, designed to provide anonymity, privacy, and security. It routes internet traffic through the Tor network and VPNs, includes tools for encryption, secure browsing, and secure communication, and offers protection against malware and other threats. Primarily targeted at individuals who need to ensure their online activities are not tracked and their data is secure.

Mobile application that allows users to scan documents using their smartphone's camera. The app uses image processing algorithms to enhance the quality of the scanned documents, making them look like they were scanned with a traditional scanner, and offers features such as OCR, annotations, and document management. CamScanner is primarily targeted at individuals and professionals who need a convenient and portable solution for scanning and managing documents.

Mobile application designed to facilitate communication, scheduling, and management tasks for sports teams. It offers features such as event scheduling, messaging, and attendance tracking, which help streamline team operations and improve coordination among coaches, managers, parents, and players. Heja is particularly beneficial for youth sports teams and amateur leagues seeking an efficient way to stay organized and connected.

Electronic signature platform that facilitates the quick and secure signing of documents online. It offers features such as ease of use, legal compliance, security, and integration with other tools, distinguishing itself with both free and paid plans to cater to different user needs. Signaturely is primarily targeted at businesses and individuals seeking a reliable and efficient solution for managing document signatures digitally.

A company that provides email security solutions, specifically focusing on DMARC (Domain-based Message Authentication, Reporting & Conformance) implementation and management. Their services help organizations protect their domains from email spoofing, phishing attacks, and other email-based threats by ensuring that only authorized senders can send emails on behalf of the domain. Easydmarc offers tools for monitoring, analyzing, and enforcing DMARC policies, making it easier for businesses to improve their email security posture.

Technology company based in Munich, Germany, specializing in construction software. The software simplifies complex daily operations in the construction industry by facilitating collaboration among project participants and coordinating tasks, leading to more efficient project management and significant savings in time and money. Capmo primarily serves construction professionals and companies looking to enhance project efficiency and reduce operational costs.

Globally operational multi-carrier integration platform based in New Delhi, India, providing advanced software solutions for B2B and B2C eCommerce businesses. ClickPost automates order creation and tracking across over 500 carriers, including FedEx and BlueDart, and offers features like a single dashboard for multi-carrier order fulfillment, real-time tracking, returns management, and COD order reconciliation. The platform primarily targets eCommerce businesses looking to streamline their shipping and delivery operations to enhance customer experience.

Marketing platform that leverages machine learning to help users create custom audiences, build lookalike models, and streamline the process of reaching target audiences. Postie simplifies the complexities of data management, audience building, and marketing execution, providing a more efficient and effective way to reach potential customers. The platform is primarily targeted at marketers and businesses looking to optimize their audience targeting and improve the efficiency of their marketing campaigns.

Email service that provides end-to-end encryption to ensure the privacy and security of user communications. ProtonMail differentiates itself with its zero access architecture, meaning even the service itself cannot read user emails, and it operates under Swiss privacy laws, which offer strong data protection. The service is ideal for individuals and organizations seeking a secure and private email solution, including those concerned with data privacy and security.

Company specializing in cloud and IoT solutions for industrial machinery manufacturers, distributors, fleet operators, and end users. Elevat focuses on connecting disconnected industrial assets, providing value through enhanced data collection, monitoring, and operational efficiency across various sectors including industrial machinery, heavy equipment, agriculture, oil, gas, and energy. The primary target demographic includes businesses and operators in these industries seeking to optimize asset management and improve operational performance.

ITADA is a company based in Prague that provides IT services and IT consulting. The company differentiates itself by offering personalized and specialized IT solutions, leveraging its small team size of 2-10 employees to deliver tailored services. ITADA primarily targets small to medium-sized businesses seeking customized IT support and consulting services.

Digital banking infrastructure provider that focuses on enhancing the speed, accuracy, and experience of customer and business onboarding for financial institutions. Signzy differentiates itself by offering AI-driven solutions that streamline compliance, reduce fraud, and improve operational efficiency through digital mediums. The primary target demographic includes banks, financial institutions, and fintech companies seeking to modernize their onboarding processes and enhance customer experience.

Modern e-commerce front-end framework built on top of Nuxt.js, designed to enhance the development of online stores. It includes preinstalled plugins, modules, and a ready-to-use e-commerce theme, providing a comprehensive solution for e-commerce front-end development. Vue Storefront is targeted at developers and businesses looking to create high-performance, scalable, and customizable e-commerce websites.

Leading professional services company that assists clients in modernizing technology, reimagining processes, and transforming experiences to stay competitive in a rapidly evolving market. The company differentiates itself through its comprehensive service offerings, including digital, technology, consulting, and operations services, which are designed to drive innovation and efficiency. Cognizant primarily serves large enterprises across various industries, including healthcare, financial services, and manufacturing, aiming to enhance their operational performance and customer experiences.
